name: Oven Baked Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Place butter and honey in a 13-inch x 9-inch pan.
2. Put the pan in the hot oven until the butter is melted.
3. Sprinkle with cinnamon.
4. Combine eggs and orange juice; beat well.
5. In a flat dish, let the bread slices soak in the egg mixture.
6. Drain the soaked bread slices and arrange them on the honey mixture.
7. Bake at 350°F until browned.
8. Invert onto a plate to serve.
